title: Calibrate governance budget for real evidence digest
rawUserRequest: 按用户授权创建独立预算修复 Work Item/PR，预留工单 3 及后续串行工单所需的治理预算，然后继续执行当前计划。

declaredIntent.summary: 预先校准 Python、Markdown 和 archiveGrowth 上限，使工单 3 及后续工单可在真实审计证据预算内完整闭环。

outOfScope: Release workflow or evidence behavior changes

sources.reason: Current limits are exactly at measured Python, Markdown, and archiveGrowth values.
Executable validation for calibrated limits and repayment records.
Serial Work Item plan requiring complete archive evidence for each item.

riskAssessment.reason: Measured limits are known; the change is restricted to bounded policy maxima and attributable repayment records.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized an independent budget repair Work Item/PR.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the new maxima are bounded and every increase has a repayment record naming the user authority and cleanup plan.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Policy maxima increase only from 35800 to the measured bounded reservation: Python 36000, Markdown 9100, archiveGrowth 450.
Repayment records identify each baseline, new limit, user authority, date, and final plan-cleanup repayment action.
Governance complexity checks pass and no implementation files are changed.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The governance limits are fully consumed before the next Work Item can create its required archive contract, summary, and manifest.
constraints: Change only governance complexity policy values and repayment records.
Use bounded reservations sufficient for the remaining serial plan, not an unlimited bypass.
Do not alter implementation behavior or archived evidence.
intent.rationale: Pre-calibrating the measured lifecycle evidence budget prevents another mid-Work-Item block and preserves one Work Item/one PR ownership.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: reserved maxima cover current measured repository counts
repayment records are attributable and complete

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized an independent budget repair Work Item/PR.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
